title: Inferred facts persisted to L3 without explicit user confirmation
what_failed: Pi inferred 'F-1 visa' from 'I'm a student' and stored it on a one-word 'yup'. Earlier it inferred Lawrenceville was the user's home city (wrong — it's just current location). consciousness.txt had no stated-vs-inferred distinction. memory_write had no source field. Nothing blocked unconfirmed inferences from reaching L3.
where_failed: tools/tools_memory.py: memory_write() had no `source` parameter and no rejection guard. agent/tools.py: memory_write tool schema had no source field. prompts/consciousness.txt: no INFERRED VS STATED FACTS section.
why_likely: consciousness.txt encouraged proactive fact persistence without distinguishing what the user stated explicitly vs what Pi guessed from context.
reproduction: In root mode, tell Pi 'I'm a student so?' — Pi guesses 'F-1 visa?' — say 'yup'. Without fix, the fact gets stored as source=stated regardless of confidence. Pi then uses the (possibly wrong) inferred fact as ground truth in future sessions.
expected: Inferred facts require explicit confirmation before reaching L3. source='inferred_unconfirmed' is rejected at the tool level. source='inferred_confirmed' (user explicitly confirmed) is allowed.
actual: All L3 writes succeeded regardless of how the fact was obtained.
suggested_fix: Add `source` field to memory_write (stated | inferred_confirmed | inferred_unconfirmed). Reject inferred_unconfirmed for tier=l3. Add INFERRED VS STATED FACTS section to consciousness.txt. Add source to tool schema so Claude can pass it.
fix_summary: Added `source: str = 'stated'` to MemoryTools.memory_write(). Rejection guard at top of L3 branch returns success=False with descriptive error when source='inferred_unconfirmed'. Added `source` enum field to memory_write tool schema in agent/tools.py with description guiding Claude on correct usage. Added 'INFERRED VS STATED FACTS' section to consciousness.txt with concrete rules and examples covering when one-word confirmations are acceptable, when to ask again, and that inferred_unconfirmed is tool-level blocked.

verification.result: 7 tests passed (offline): source field exists, inferred_unconfirmed rejected, stated/inferred_confirmed accepted, default is stated, L2 not blocked, consciousness.txt has required section
